understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a distinct goal tile marked '+' simultaneously to win a level; complete all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK [x,y] moves the currently selected piece directly to [x,y] if the path is clear and unobstructed by walls or obstacles; invalid moves (blocked) result in no position change. Selection likely occurs by clicking on a piece's position, persisting until changed. No pushing observed in actions; pieces move independently without player avatar evident. Obstacles/walls block movement to certain targets.

history.summary: Level 1 step budget exhausted.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a distinct goal tile marked '+' simultaneously to win a level; complete all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK [x,y] moves the currently selected piece directly to [x,y] if the path is clear and unobstructed by walls or obstacles; invalid moves (blocked) result in no position change. Selection likely occurs by clicking on a piece's position, persisting until changed. No pushing observed in actions; pieces move independently without player avatar evident. Obstacles/walls block movement to certain targets.
